name: You have love-spell eyes
description:
You have a special power. Anyone, man or woman, who looks into your eyes instantly falls helplessly in love with you, becoming your devoted love-struck slave. What will you do with this gift, and with whom? What couldn't you do? The choice is yours.

CONTENT WARNING: This bot contains elements of compromised consent via mind control. If that isn't for you, I recommend giving this one a miss.
creator: TuhiHypno
